name: TMB Settings SE — Best of all (cloud) · v0.1
note: Benchmark-composed virtual model: each skill axis routes to the model the TMB benchmarks proved best on it. Cloud regime = best-of-all, no slot constraints. Snapshot is dated and frozen; refreshed ~monthly from the scoreboards (plus ad-hoc when a hyped new model lands). Comet ids are filled where confirmed; empty ids fall back to OpenRouter (resolution option 1). Verify ids against the provider's /models via the dashboard Test button.

axes.label: Creative / long-form writing
axes.description: Long-form prose, storytelling, marketing copy, essays in any language. Not here if the deliverable is code.

axes.label: GDPR / privacy compliance
axes.description: GDPR and privacy compliance questions, DPA reviews, EU data-protection analysis.

axes.label: Multi-jurisdiction legal
axes.description: Multi-jurisdiction legal analysis, contracts, regulatory edge cases beyond GDPR.

axes.label: Reasoning / logic
axes.description: Logic puzzles, multi-step deduction, argument analysis — the deliverable is reasoning, not code.

axes.label: Calculation / structured
axes.description: Structured computation, math word problems, tables, unit conversions, numeric consistency.

axes.label: Python / scripts
axes.description: Python scripts, data pipelines, notebooks. The deliverable is Python code.

axes.label: General coding
axes.description: General coding when no language-specific axis fits. The safe default bucket.

axes.label: Debugging
axes.description: Find and fix a bug in provided code, stack-trace analysis, regression hunting.

axes.label: React / frontend
axes.description: React or frontend TS/JS work: components, hooks, state, CSS.

axes.label: Swift
axes.bench: GAP — no strong model benched yet (unbound: excluded from routing)

axes.label: Refactoring
axes.description: Restructure existing code without changing behaviour; extract, rename, simplify.

axes.label: Planning — decomposition
axes.description: Breaking a project or feature into tasks, milestones, work units.

axes.label: Planning — spec / handoff
axes.description: Writing specs, handoff documents, RFCs for someone else to implement.

axes.label: Planning — judgment / traps
axes.description: Reviewing plans for risks, traps, missing pieces; architectural judgment calls.

axes.label: Tools & fast coding
axes.description: Quick tool-calling turns, short factual lookups, low-latency agent steps.
axes.bench: latency axis — no dedicated quality score

qwen-3.6.name: Qwen 3.6
qwen-3.6.note: OR id best-effort — verify via the dashboard Test button

claude-opus.note: id as benched in TMB cloud v0.1
